transactions.desc: Atlanta recalled Jarvis from Triple-A Gwinnett on Thursday.
Atlanta designated Tellez for assignment Thursday.
The Washington Nationals traded INF Randal Diaz to the Baltimore Orioles.
The Baltimore Orioles traded RHP Kyle Nicolas to the Washington Nationals and optioned him to the minors.
The Giants recalled Koss from Triple-A Sacramento on Wednesday.
The Pirates optioned Bidois to Triple-A Indianapolis on Wednesday.
The Pirates recalled Sanders from Triple-A Indianapolis on Wednesday.
The Yankees optioned Cruz to Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre on Wednesday.
The Dodgers recalled Barnes from Triple-A Oklahoma City ahead of Wednesday's matchup against the Athletics.
The Rockies designated Brebbia for assignment on Wednesday, Thomas Harding of MLB.com reports.
The Rockies recalled Hughes from Triple-A Albuquerque on Wednesday, Thomas Harding of MLB.com reports.
The Royals optioned Cerantola to Triple-A Omaha on Wednesday.
The Royals recalled Dobnak from Triple-A Omaha on Wednesday.
The Royals selected Cuas' contract from Triple-A Omaha on Wednesday.
The Dodgers optioned Mills to Triple-A Oklahoma City following Tuesday's 9-3 win over the Athletics.
The Blue Jays recalled Clase from Triple-A Buffalo on Wednesday.
The Tigers recalled Brieske from Triple-A Toledo on Wednesday.
The Rangers recalled Smith from Triple-A Round Rock on Wednesday, Evan Grant of The Dallas Morning News reports.
The Red Sox recalled Gamboa from Triple-A Worcester on Wednesday.
The Orioles designated Keegan for assignment Wednesday.
The Red Sox activated Moran (elbow) from the 15-day injured list Wednesday.
The Orioles optioned Walker to Triple-A Norfolk on Wednesday.
The Orioles optioned Gibson to Triple-A Norfolk on Wednesday.
The Orioles recalled Weston from Triple-A Norfolk on Wednesday.
The Red Sox acquired Harris from the Athletics on Tuesday in exchange for right-hander Ben Hansen, Mark Feinsand of MLB.com reports.
The Red Sox designated Kahnle for assignment Wednesday.
The Athletics traded INF Brett Harris to the Boston Red Sox.
The Boston Red Sox traded RHP Ben Hansen to the  Athletics.
The Orioles activated Kremer (quadriceps) from the 60-day injured list Wednesday.
The White Sox optioned Schweitzer to Triple-A Charlotte on Wednesday.
